name: Bleeding Deities
short_description: Embark on a journey through a hand-drawn world of Bleeding Deities inspired by ancient tribes and their beliefs. Unveil dark secrets, face ruthless challenges, and confront evil deities as you search for the Legendary Baktun Stone. Will you restore peace to your people?
detailed_description:
Key Features

  • Classic side-scrolling adventure with modern solutions. Experience the nostalgia of a classic platformer with a modern twist.

  • Face formidable foes in epic boss battles that test your skill and strategy, offering a rewarding challenge and progression.

  • All spoken dialogues are performed in a living Mayan language, bringing cultural depth.

  • Equip powers gained from defeated deities, use them in combat and reach previously unreachable areas

  • Navigate a nonlinear world at your own pace, unlocking areas and secrets that shape the unfolding narrative.

  • Solve puzzles throughout the adventure, testing your problem-solving skills and unlocking new pathways.

  • Explore a vast, perilous world filled with traps and enemies inspired by Maya lore, requiring strategic thinking and combat prowess.

  • Feel the depth of a Maya-inspired soundtrack, enhancing your gameplay with emotional resonance at every moment.

  • Immerse yourself in a captivating story set in a Maya-inspired world, unraveling the mysteries of ancient civilization.

  • Experience the game's beauty through meticulously crafted 2D hand-drawn animations, bringing characters and environments to life.

Captivating story

Immerse yourself in amazing story about love, pain and sorrow, and decisions that can change your life. Unlock new fragments of the story, discover secrets and stop Teot tribe from ruling. Each tribe represents different world.

From temples, to caves and swamps. Although the general objective of the protagonist is established from the beginning, you will discover unique mechanics in each one of the Tribes that allows you exploring in different ways.

There is always something new to discover. As you progress, the scenarios will become more complex and large. Look for a hidden passages and secrets to reveal whole story.

Challenge Evil Deities and obtain new abilities

Defeat guardians of the temples in order to obtain temple keys and invoke the deity of each tribe, followed by an intense fight. Each defeated deity will reward you with a special power that you can equip, giving you access to new combat abilities and allow you to access new areas.

2D Hand-Drawn

From the landscapes to the characters – everything is drawn by hand throughout their entire process. Experience animations created in the classic way. Frame by frame. Let yourself be enveloped by penetrating music that transmits pain and agony of the protagonist during his adventure. Each theme is designed to create unique atmosphere that captures essence of each tribe.

Story

The time for sacrifices has arrived, the Deities demand fresh blood and the hunt for new offerings is about to begin. For a long time Teot Tribe has kept the people oppressed with the use of fear and abuse of power.

Year after year they celebrate its rituals of human sacrifice. For this they invade vulnerable communities to take new prey against their will and offer them as tribute to their Deity.

One day they broke into the calm village and a massacre broke out. Canek's brothers were captured and now you must get them back before they are sacrificed.

Explore each of the tribes in search of your brothers with the help of the Master, a mythical character of great knowledge and wisdom, using a portal that will transport you to different tribes . Each tribe has different temples and maze with doors to unlock, and codes to be found to decipher puzzles.

In each tribe you will find a unique atmosphere with their own essence, you must face ruthless enemies inspired by ancient warriors who used masks and animal heads to demonstrate their hierarchy .

You will have to face this ruthless world and defeat the Evil Deities to reveal the disturbing truth behind it all.

-These have been dark times since the Teot tribe controls the fate of the town.

Someone needs to stop this massacre-

.
